race.comment: The on-pace runners hold the key in a race made a bit easier with some key scratchings. TAUPE (12) returns after a four-month spell. Placed at three of four runs in the maiden campaign with the peak performance a second over this distance at Moe. Looks forward enough to run a big race after three recent trials. MYSTERIOUS MASTER (5) has switched from Waterhouse/Bott to Brent Stanley and is fresh from a 20-week break. Showed ability at the NSW provincials last prep which is solid form. A recent Bendigo jump-out win is a positive sign. SIGNED BY A KISS (14) has been kept fresh since failing on debut in the Listed Dequetteville over 1050m in Adelaide 44 days ago. Lowers the bar substantially today and clearly has ability given the task assigned last time. MEET ME AT THE BAR (3) hasn't been all that far away in two runs to date. Likely improver. LAST DANDELION (1) is a Bel Esprit first starter who won a recent Bendigo jump-out - worth monitoring for market support.
